_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assure that the use of technologies maintain, and do not erode, privacy protections on use, collection and disclosure of personal information.
reference_document_element_description: Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies covering quality, privacy, security, ethics, and responsible use.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-001 (SP, cosine: 0.528), SP-T-008 (SP, cosine: 0.521).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.450). Shared vocabulary: [privacy, use]. DCWF-only terms [assure, collection, disclosure, erode, information, maintain] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, communicate, covering, data, enforce, enterprise] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.877, R=0.878). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Assure that the use of technologies maintain, and do not erode, privacy protecti" and "Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies coverin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.558 > STS 0.450 (gap +0.108). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [privacy, use] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Shared tokens: [privacy, use]. DCWF-only: [assure, collection, disclosure, erode, information, maintain]. WIDAI-only: [ai, communicate, covering, data, enforce, enterprise].

signals.detail: STS 0.450 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
